steps.title: Separate ratings from predictions
steps.content: The prompt assumes P4 gave equal actual ratings to abstract and cubist paintings. The question asks what the model predicted, so the relevant evidence is the graph's different model-participant correlations.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported direction
steps.content: Choices B and C claim one style was enjoyed more, which correlation data alone do not show. Choice D says the predicted ratings were equal. The remaining choice only says the predicted ratings differed. The answer is A.
